description_long: This object is a stylized megaphone with a large, dual-cone speaker system mounted horizontally atop a tapered, rectangular base. The cones are pale yellow and joined at the center by a red cylindrical connector, giving the appearance of a symmetrical sound projection device. The base is dark gray with red vertical accents on the sides and features a control panel with green, blue, and red buttons, as well as a pair of green speaker-like elements resembling eyes. The top of the base has a small crown-like metallic structure, possibly for signal reception or decoration. The overall design is robust and industrial, suggesting it is intended for outdoor or public address use in urban environments. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with a matte finish and some glossy highlights on the buttons.
description: A dual-cone, industrial megaphone with a dark gray base, red accents, and a colorful control panel, designed for public address in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with colored buttons, green speaker elements, and the full width of the dual yellow cones.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the yellow cones and the red connector, with minimal visibility of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the base and the dual cones, with no visible control panel or buttons.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view similar to view 1, emphasizing the cone structure and the red connector, with the base partially visible.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: The mouthpiece is not distinctly visible; the cones are large, flared, and symmetrical, joined at a central red connector with no separate mouthpiece attachment.
